description: Business-first computer vision delivery guide for Codex. Turn an operational goal into a scoped proof plan, verified evidence, costs, and a decision.

defaultPrompt: I need to reduce missed defects on this line. Help me prove whether computer vision is viable.
Turn this plain-language computer vision problem into a measured delivery plan.
Estimate the data, review, compute, and deployment economics before I invest.
interface.longDescription: Describe the operational outcome in plain language. Sentinel guides you through scoping the computer-vision task, freezing business and evaluation gates, measuring a baseline, recording replayable evidence, and estimating the economics for a go, revise, or stop decision. Generated artifacts and live provider results require execution and verification. Roboflow integrations remain delegated to Roboflow's current MCP and computer-vision-skills plugin.
interface.shortDescription: Guide a business CV problem toward verified proof and a decision.

name: sentinel
